intent: 1BR / 1 bath narrow-shell smoke test, no carport. 8.5x12 lot gives a 4.5x8 envelope = 36 m2 floor at ratio 0.5625 (deep). 8x12 itself is infeasible for this topology (4x8 envelope too narrow, CP-SAT proves infeasible); 8.5x12 is the minimal width bump that solves, with 1 soft warning (preferred-tier kitchen depth relaxed to base minimum).
